chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitution Petition No.S-131 of 2017. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For order son office objection at flag.A. Notice issued to respondents No. 1 to 4, AAG and DPG. 12.06.2017. Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Jokhio, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Aijaz Mustafa Samtio DDPP for the State. ---------------- ASI-Muhammad Moosa Jatoi, SHO, Police Station Allahabad/ respondent No.1 has appeared and files statement that the petitioner has not been harassed nor will be harassed in future. In view of such statement this petition is disposed of. The official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. J U D G E S Ashfaq
